sentences.text_original: 你最近看起来气色不错，是不是开始运动了？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuì jìn kàn qǐ lái qì sè bú cuò, shì bú shì kāi shǐ yùn dòng le?
sentences.text_translation: Yaqinda rang-ro'ying yaxshi ko'rinyapti, sport bilan shug'ullana boshladingmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты в последнее время хорошо выглядишь, начал заниматься спортом?
sentences.text_translation_en: You've been looking good lately — did you start exercising?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对。我上个月开始每天跑步。
sentences.pinyin: Duì. Wǒ shàng ge yuè kāi shǐ měi tiān pǎo bù.
sentences.text_translation: Ha. O'tgan oydan beri har kuni yugura boshladim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да. С прошлого месяца я каждый день бегаю.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah. I started running every day last month.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 一般跑四十分钟。跑完以后感觉很舒服。
sentences.pinyin: Yì bān pǎo sì shí fēn zhōng. Pǎo wán yǐ hòu gǎn jué hěn shū fu.
sentences.text_translation: Odatda qirq daqiqa yuguraman. Yugurib bo'lgach o'zimni juda yengil his qilaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Обычно бегаю сорок минут. После пробежки чувствую себя очень хорошо.
sentences.text_translation_en: Usually about forty minutes. I feel great after running.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zǎo shang pǎo hái shì wǎn shang pǎo?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you run in the morning or in the evening?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 早上跑。早上空气比较好，人也少。
sentences.pinyin: Zǎo shang pǎo. Zǎo shang kōng qì bǐ jiào hǎo, rén yě shǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Ertalab yuguraman. Ertalab havo toza, odam ham kam.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Утром. Утром воздух чище, и людей меньше.
sentences.text_translation_en: In the morning. The air is fresher and there are fewer people.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 除了跑步，你还做别的运动吗？
sentences.pinyin: Chú le pǎo bù, nǐ hái zuò bié de yùn dòng ma?
sentences.text_translation: Yugurishdan tashqari boshqa sport bilan shug'ullanasanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Кроме бега, ты занимаешься другим спортом?
sentences.text_translation_en: Besides running, do you do any other exercise?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 周末我会去游泳。游泳对肩膀很好。
sentences.pinyin: Zhōu mò wǒ huì qù yóu yǒng. Yóu yǒng duì jiān bǎng hěn hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Dam olish kunlari suzgani boraman. Suzish yelka uchun juda foydali.
sentences.text_translation_ru: По выходным я хожу плавать. Плавание полезно для плеч.
sentences.text_translation_en: On weekends I go swimming. Swimming is good for the shoulders.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你的生活习惯改变了不少。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ de shēng huó xí guàn gǎi biàn le bù shǎo.
sentences.text_translation_en: Your lifestyle habits have changed quite a bit.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 是啊。以前我经常熬夜，早上起不来。
sentences.pinyin: Shì a. Yǐ qián wǒ jīng cháng áo yè, zǎo shang qǐ bù lái.
sentences.text_translation: Ha. Ilgari tez-tez tunni bedor o'tkazardim, ertalab turolmasdim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да. Раньше я часто не спал по ночам и не мог встать утром.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah. I used to stay up late often and couldn't get up in the morning.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 熬夜对身体不好，我也知道，但是改不了。
sentences.pinyin: Áo yè duì shēn tǐ bù hǎo, wǒ yě zhī dào, dàn shì gǎi bù liǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Tunni bedor o'tkazish sog'liqqa zararli, men ham bilaman, lekin tashlay olmayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Поздно ложиться вредно для здоровья, я знаю, но не могу это изменить.
sentences.text_translation_en: Staying up late is bad for your health — I know, but I can't change it.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 你可以慢慢来。先从早睡开始。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ kě yǐ màn man lái. Xiān cóng zǎo shuì kāi shǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Asta-sekin qilsang bo'ladi. Avval erta yotishdan boshla.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Можешь делать это постепенно. Начни с того, чтобы ложиться раньше.
sentences.text_translation_en: You can take it slow. Start by going to bed early.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ wǎn shang jǐ diǎn shuì?
sentences.text_translation_en: What time do you go to sleep?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 十一点以前。睡够了第二天精神好。
sentences.pinyin: Shí yī diǎn yǐ qián. Shuì gòu le dì èr tiān jīng shén hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: O'n birdan oldin. Yetarli uxlasang, ertasi kuni tetik bo'lasan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: До одиннадцати. Если выспаться, на следующий день бодрость есть.
sentences.text_translation_en: Before eleven. If you sleep enough, you have energy the next day.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你说得对。我打算从今天开始早睡。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de duì. Wǒ dǎ suàn cóng jīn tiān kāi shǐ zǎo shuì.
sentences.text_translation: To'g'ri aytasan. Bugundan boshlab erta yotmoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты прав. Я собираюсь с сегодняшнего дня ложиться рано.
sentences.text_translation_en: You're right. I'm going to start going to bed early from today.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好习惯要坚持。坚持一段时间，你会发现变化。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo xí guàn yào jiān chí. Jiān chí yí duàn shí jiān, nǐ huì fā xiàn biàn huà.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi odatni davom ettirish kerak. Bir muddat sabot qilsang, o'zgarishni sezasan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошие привычки нужно поддерживать. Продержись какое-то время — заметишь изменения.
sentences.text_translation_en: Good habits need persistence. Keep at it for a while and you'll notice changes.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Xī wàng wǒ néng zuò dào.
sentences.text_translation_en: I hope I can do it.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 你一定能！到时候我们一起跑步。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yí dìng néng! Dào shí hou wǒ men yì qǐ pǎo bù.
sentences.text_translation_ru: У тебя обязательно получится! Тогда будем бегать вместе.
sentences.text_translation_en: You definitely can! When the time comes, we'll run together.
sentences.speaker: B
